name: @three-flatland/skills
description: Claude Code skills for the three-flatland ecosystem (TSL, …).

scripts.validate: if command -v uvx >/dev/null 2>&1; then for d in */; do uvx --from skills-ref agentskills validate "$d" || exit 1; done; else echo 'uvx not found — skipping agentskills structural validate (install uv to run it locally/CI)'; fi && node ../scripts/validate-skills.ts .
